title: NIT Calicut – Adjunct Faculty/ Visiting Faculty/ Professor of Practice
org: Adjunct Faculty/ Visiting Faculty/ Professor of Practice
shortInfo: The National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Recruitment 2026 for posts of Not Mentioned Adjunct Faculty/ Visiting Faculty/ Professor of Practice. Candidates with Any Graduate, Any Post Graduate, M.Phil/Ph.D Can Apply Online. The online application opens on Available Soon, and closes on 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NIT Calicut website, https://nitc.ac.in.
